अिधसूचना के 灹काशन क琉 तारीख से तीन वष猀 के िलए के瀈灶ीय क琉टनाशी बोड榁 म犆 नामिन琖द玗 करती है और भारत सरकार के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (i) म犆 त瀄कालीन खा獸, कृिष, सामुदाियक िवकास और सहका琇रता मं灴ालय क琉 अिधसूचना सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 301, तारीख 27 फरवरी, 1971 का और संशोधन करने के िलए िन玈िलिखत संशोधन करती है अथा榁त् :- उ猴 अिधसूचना म犆 मद (xx) और उससे संबंिधत 灹िवि玗य犘 के 瀡थान पर िन玈िलिखत मद और 灹िवि玗यां रखी जाएंगी, अथा榁त् :- “(xx) डॉ. एस. चं灶शेखर, िनदेशक वै榀ािनक औ獸ोिगक अनुसंधान प琇रषद~~ भारतीय रासायिनक तकनीक琉 सं瀡थान, उ瀉पल रोड, तारनाका, हैदराबाद-500007A” [फा.सं.13028/03/2015-पीपी-I] डॉ. बी. राजे瀈दर, संयु榉त सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण: मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (i) म犆 अिधसूचना सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 301, तारीख 27 फरवरी, 1971 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी और अंितम संशोधन का.आ. 1630(अ), तारीख 17 अ灹ैल, 2018 को 琈कया गया था । MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE AND FARMERS WELFARE (Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th December, 2018 S.O. 6148 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 4 of the Insecticides Act, 1968 (46 of 1968), the Central Government hereby nominate the following person to be a member of the Central Insecticides Board for a period of three years from the date of publication of this notification and for that purpose makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Food, Agriculture, Community Development and Cooperation, published in Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), number G.S.R. 301, dated the 27th February, 1971, namely:- In the said notification, for item (xx) and the entries relating thereto, the following item and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “(xx) Dr. S. Chandrasekhar, Director, Council of Scientific Industrial Research-Indian Institute of Chemical Technology, Uppal Road, Tarnaka, Hyderabad-500007.” [F. No. 13028/03/2015-PP-I] Dr. B. RAJENDER, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide number G.S.R. 301, dated the 27th February, 1971 and last amended vide number S.O. 1630 (E), dated the 17th April, 2018. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
